title: KIDWILL Montessori Toys for 1 Year Old Boys Girls Wooden Hammering Pounding Toys with Xylophone, Number Maze, Pounding Bench Educational Montessori Gift for 1 2 3 Year Old Boys Girls
features: 【Multifunctional Montessori Toys Set】This versatile montessori toy set is a classic pounding bench, musical xylophone, and number maze puzzle in one. Includes ten pegs on the bench, hit and hamsters pop up and down in turns and show their naughty smiles. Two hammers and mallets allows two or more kids to make some pleasant tones, or sort numbers on the other side.

【Educational Yet Joyful Toy】The pounding process encourages children’ hands-eye coordination and tactile development. 8-note xylophone playing enables kids to be more sensitive to different sounds and improve their music perception. Number maze puzzles gives a great workout to kids brain, and also let younger ones to recognize numbers.

【High Quality & Without Worries】The wooden toys set is Made with high quality wood materials, sturdy and smooth to touch for children. Water-based paint offers a shiny and polished finish on the surface. No small pieces and no risk of choking, children are well-protected and without worries when babies play. Note: Water-based paint products cannot be wiped with alcohol-containing wipes

【Wonderful Toddler Toy】Fully tested to meet the highest standards, this unique learning toy will be an excellent toy for age 1 2 3 year old preschool toddler boys and girls. Perfectly designed for small hands to grasp and touch, great toy idea for kids birthday, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas and more.
【What You Get】(1) Hammering Pounding Toy; (2) 2* Hammer; (3) 2*Mallet.
description: Product Description KIDWILL has been dedicated to designing toys suitable for children of all ages. We believe in the power of play and toys kids are playing with have an impact on them even after they grow up. Our toys will help your kids explore the world, cultivate their thinking, develop hands-on ability, accompany them through their childhood. Our Toys Made with quality and care, our toys inspire a world of discovery and hands-on learning. Our Mission To ignite imagination and wonder, so children can discover their interests and passions themselves. Our Promise To make you satisfy with your purchase is our commitment to every caring parent. Warm Tips: Children shall play under adults supervision. Wooden toys shall be placed in cool and well-ventilated place, and avoid moisture. Please do not wash with water. Clean with dry cotton cloth to wipe the surface gently. Note: Water-based paint products cannot be wiped with alcohol-containing wipes
